"packet_id=T3FNSCOUT-21D6AD05329C20B52A88

repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-600CD212
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
Return the three-line status record."

The system message: "Data formatting task. Return a plain text record with three key=value lines. Fields, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. Do not add headings, explanations, JSON, Markdown, or extra lines. Begin with route_verdict=."

So we must output three lines: route_verdict=... repair_target=... blocked_move=... exactly as given.

Make sure to include the exact values.

Thus:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=stress-test and preserve blocker ids: ART-001-BLK-600CD212
blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it

No extra lines. Ensure not to wrap lines incorrectly.

Thus final.
</think>

blocked_move=do not override blocker with consensus unless sources close it
